zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach於1475年4月8日出生在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，她的父親Johann Hans Heimbach18歲，母親Lady Anna Maria Seelbach17歲。她於1498年與John Hammond結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年10月16日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach于1475年4月8日出生在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德时，她的父亲Johann Hans Heimbach18岁，母亲Lady Anna Maria Seelbach17岁。她于1498年与John Hammond结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年10月16日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Johne
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach was born on 8 April 1475, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, her father, Johann Hans Heimbach, was 18 and her mother, Lady Anna Maria Seelbach, was 17. She married John Hammond in 1498. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 October 1542, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach est née le 8 avril 1475, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Johann Hans Heimbach, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Anna Maria Seelbach, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Hammond en 1498. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Milford, Suffolk, England: Milford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach am 8. April 1475 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Hans Heimbach 18 und ihre Mutter Lady Anna Maria Seelbach 17. Sie hat 1498 John Hammond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1542 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach è nata il il 8 aprile 1475 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Johann Hans Heimbach, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Lady Anna Maria Seelbach, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Hammond nel 1498. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Long Melford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Johanna Johne Heimbachが1475年4月8日にイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父Johann Hans Heimbachは18歳，母Lady Anna Maria Seelbachは17歳であった。1498年にJohn Hammondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年10月16日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Milford, Suffolk, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 미퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach(이)가 1475년 4월 8일 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Hans Heimbach(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anna Maria Seelbach(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1498년 John Hammond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 10월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach nasceu em 8 de abril de 1475, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Johann Hans Heimbach, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anna Maria Seelbach, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hammond em 1498. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Milford, Suffolk, England: милфорд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach родилась 8 апреля 1475 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Johann Hans Heimbach было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anna Maria Seelbach, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hammond в 1498 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 октября 1542 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con John Hammond en 1498. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
